title: Comfort Systems Announces New Board Member
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (NYSE:FIX), a leading provider of commercial, industrial and institutional heating, ventilation, air conditioning and electrical contracting services, today announced the appointment of Rhoman J. Hardy to its Board of Directors (the “Board”). Mr. Hardy brings to the Board added depth of experience technically and operationally as well as meaningful executive and board-level management expertise. Mr. Hardy, age 54, founded HardLine Consulting L.

title: Are Investors Undervaluing Comfort Systems USA (FIX) Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: Primerica And Comfort Systems USA: 2 Fast-Growing Dividends Worth Investors' Attention
text: Investors can often be classified as growth or income investors, with dividend growth investors falling in between. Primerica Inc. and Comfort Systems USA are two companies showing rapid earnings growth and consistent dividend growth. PRI is trading at a decent valuation and offers potential for further growth, while FIX may require more patience due to its recent rapid ascent in share price.
